title: Woman Realizes Her Online Date Killed Her Husband

beats.description: Dramatic 911 audio and chilling quotes from the crime scene immediately establish tension and mystery.
Narrator introduces the incident, followed by the full 911 call and initial police arrival at the bloody scene.
Bodycam footage shows paramedics treating the victim while officers interview Haley, revealing the tangled relationship and suspect's flight.
Suspect is located via family tip and arrested; narrative shifts from the active crime scene to the interrogation room.
Extended interrogation where Eddie confesses, detailing the Ouija board, drinking, sexual encounter, sudden rage, and the brutal stabbing.
Eddie reveals Haley's pregnancy, writes a tearful letter, and engages in raw self-talk, exposing his psychological state and rationalizations.
Narrator summarizes victim's injuries, legal charges, sentencing, and appeal outcome before channel outro.

_analysis_metadata.transcript_preview: stab me at my house. >> Please don't do this to me. >> We were playing on Ouija board >> and he was talking about how he wants to summon a demon into the house. >> Just like a light switch. It was the scariest thing I ever saw. >> When dispatchers in Spokane, Washington answer a 911 call, an urgent cry for help is followed by chaos and screaming on the other end of the line. Police respond to a scene where a man lies naked and stabbed. A woman stands soaked in his blood and a third person has vanished, leaving behind a trail of questions and the fractured remains of a knight gone horribly wrong. The following is based on official police records and the footage has never been seen before until now. It's just before ...
